name: python3-syslog-rfc5424-formatter
title: python3-syslog-rfc5424-formatter
summary: Python logging formatter for emitting RFC5424 Syslog messages (Python 3)
description:
Python logging formatter for emitting RFC5424 Syslog messages (Python 3)
This module implements a Python logging formatter which produces well-formed
RFC5424-compatible Syslog messages to a given socket.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
